title: Ambiguity Resolver
constraints: You may only modify the system prompt
The agent must not ask clarifying questions when the query is already specific
No additional tools or code logic may be added
hints: Define what makes a query 'ambiguous' vs 'clear' in the prompt with explicit criteria
Include examples of ambiguous queries and the clarifying questions the agent should ask
Instruct the agent to proceed immediately when all required information is present

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: This prompt makes the agent guess instead of asking for clarification
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a travel booking assistant. Help users book flights and hotels. Always provide a complete answer."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm

# Test 1: Vague query — should ask clarifying questions
result1 = chain.invoke({"input": "Book a flight"})
print("Vague query:", result1.content)

# Test 2: Specific query — should proceed
result2 = chain.invoke({"input": "Book a one-way flight from New York JFK to London Heathrow on March 15, 2025, economy class, for 1 adult"})
print("Specific query:", result2.content)

# Test 3: Partially vague — should ask about missing info only
result3 = chain.invoke({"input": "I need a flight from San Francisco to Tokyo next week"})
print("Partial query:", result3.content)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: This instruction makes the agent guess instead of asking for clarification
agent = Agent(
    name="Travel Assistant",
    instructions="You are a travel booking assistant. Help users book flights and hotels. Always provide a complete answer.",
)

# Test 1: Vague query — should ask clarifying questions
result1 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Book a flight")
print("Vague query:", result1.final_output)

# Test 2: Specific query — should proceed
result2 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Book a one-way flight from New York JFK to London Heathrow on March 15, 2025, economy class, for 1 adult")
print("Specific query:", result2.final_output)

# Test 3: Partially vague — should ask about missing info only
result3 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "I need a flight from San Francisco to Tokyo next week")
print("Partial query:", result3.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: This backstory makes the agent guess instead of asking for clarification
assistant = Agent(
    role="Travel Assistant",
    goal="Help users book flights and hotels",
    backstory="You are a travel booking assistant. Help users book flights and hotels. Always provide a complete answer.",
    llm=llm,
)

queries = [
    "Book a flight",
    "Book a one-way flight from New York JFK to London Heathrow on March 15, 2025, economy class, for 1 adult",
    "I need a flight from San Francisco to Tokyo next week",
]
for q in queries:
    task = Task(description=q, expected_output="A booking response", agent=assistant)
    crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
    result = crew.kickoff()
    print(f"Query: {q}\nResponse: {result}\n")

evaluationCriteria.label: Asks clarifying questions for vague queries
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent identifies missing information and asks targeted clarifying questions

evaluationCriteria.label: Proceeds on clear queries
evaluationCriteria.description: When all required information is present, the agent acts without unnecessary questions

evaluationCriteria.label: Does not over-ask
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent only asks about genuinely missing information, not details already provided

evaluationCriteria.label: Handles partially complete queries
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent acknowledges provided info and asks only about what's missing
